summary: Armatec is a Nordic group with operations in Sweden (HQ), Denmark, Norway, and Finland. Part of Ernströmgruppen. Specializes in flow technology solutions for heating, cooling, industrial processes, and energy. Products include valves, actuators, expansion vessels, heat exchangers, pumps, and automatic air vents. Main customers are industrial companies, pipe contractors, and wholesalers in the Nordic region. Strong ROE (26.1%) and ROA (15.3%). Key contact: Tommi Hannula (tommi.hannula@armatec.com).
notes: Distributor across all Nordic countries. Already sells pumps and valves - potential direct customer for our variable frequency circulating pumps. Strong financial health. Part of larger group (Ernströmgruppen).
